ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay type */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of genomic assay (e.g., Bisulfite-Seq, RNA-Seq, ChIP-Seq) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assay type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the assay protocol */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the assay protocol */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assay (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of assay used */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment data was loaded into the system */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment data was released */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bio-project */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bio-sample */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the experiment data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES bioprojects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES biosamples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "library_selection" TEXT /* Method of library selection */,
  "library_source" TEXT /* Source of the library */,
  "library_layout" TEXT /* Layout of the library (e.g., PAIRED, SINGLE) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the library */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the library (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_name" TEXT /* Name of the run */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Sequencing instrument used */,
  "avg_spot_len" INTEGER /* Average length of the spots */,
  "insert_size" INTEGER /* Insert size of the sequencing */,
  "m_bases" INTEGER /* Number of megabases generated */,
  "m_bytes" INTEGER /* Number of megabytes of data generated */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the run data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the run data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., in progress, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_organism_id FOREIGN KEY ("organism_id") REFERENCES organisms ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bioprojects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bio-project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the bio-project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bio-project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biosamples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bio-sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the bio-sample */,
  "bio_project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bio-project */,
  "bio_sample_model" TEXT /* Model of the bio-sample */,
  "consent" TEXT /* Consent for the bio-sample */,
  "datastore_filetype" TEXT /* Type of the data store file */,
  "datastore_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data store */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "geo_loc_name" TEXT /* Geographic location of the sample collection */,
  "isolate" TEXT /* Isolate information */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source of the isolation */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue type of the sample */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the sample data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the sample data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biosamples_bio_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("bio_project_id") REFERENCES bioprojects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organism */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the organism data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the organism data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organism data (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequencing platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequencing platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the platform data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the platform data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the platform data (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
